message:
feat(engine): enrich EvalError with correlation IDs, source locations, and stack frames

Introduce three new structs to the EvalError type for comprehensive
error diagnostics in the eval pipeline:

- EvalCorrelationIds: trace_id, decision_id, policy_id for linking eval
  errors to governance decisions and audit trails
- EvalSourceLocation: file, line_start/end, column_start/end for
  pinpointing error origins in extension source code
- EvalStackFrame: structured stack traces with function name, source,
  line, and column for debugging multi-layer eval failures

The QuickJsInspiredNativeEngine and V8InspiredNativeEngine are rewritten
to use a real eval_via_native_pipeline() function that goes through
parse -> lower -> execute stages instead of just echoing trimmed source.
New helper functions (map_parse_error, map_lowering_error,
map_interpreter_error, attach_eval_correlation) provide structured error
mapping at each pipeline stage.

ExceptionTransitionEvent gains error_class, location, and stack_frames
fields for richer exception telemetry.

Integration tests updated to validate the new enriched error model
including correlation ID propagation and stack frame construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
